01 — Who I am

About Me

TK
🇱🇰 Sri Lanka
LocationKegalle, Sri Lanka
UniversityNIBM City University
Emailtkandepola@gmail.com
StatusOpen to Work

I build things that live on the internet —
and make people feel something.

I'm Thisal Kandepola, a 2nd year Software Engineering student at NIBM City University. My passion sits at the intersection of beautiful design and solid engineering — creating digital products that are as delightful to use as they are robust under the hood.

When I'm not coding, I explore the frontiers of AI, dream about aerospace design, build robotics systems, and craft brand identities. I believe great software is an act of empathy.

UI/UX DesignFull Stack DevAI & ML Game DesignRoboticsBrandingAerospace

PHP · Web System

Grocery Store System

A full-featured grocery store management system built with PHP. Handles product listings, inventory management, shopping cart and order processing for a complete retail experience.

Computer Shop
